name: Godot-Secure
desc: Godot Secure is a Simple Python Script That modify the Godot Source Code Automatically, to integrate Camellia-256 / AES-256 encryption with a unique security t…
descFull: Godot Secure is a Simple Python Script That modify the Godot Source Code Automatically, to integrate Camellia-256 / AES-256 encryption with a unique security token system. This solution creates a cryptographically unique engine build that prevents generic decryption tools from accessing your game assets.
